'''Lotas''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Biography==

Lotas began his career as a full-fleshed bounty hunter without [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] implants. This eventually changed after he captured a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] prey and delivered him or her to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Imperial admiral, secretly a strong investor in [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] technologies, offered Lotas a choice between a 7,000-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] reward or 25,000 credits in prototype cybernetic attachments. Lotas accepted the cybernetics and became a test subject for SoroSuub.<ref name="AIR" />

Lotas noticed an improved performance of himself, so he began accepting cybernetic implants instead of cash for bounties, and he also bought more cybernetic implants with monetary bounties.<ref name="AIR" />

During a competitive run-in with [[Jodo Kast]] in [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]], Lotas lost his right arm, but he gladly replaced it with a cybernetic one.<ref name="AIR" />

At some time between [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Lotas joined [[Ploovo's Protocol Team]], a group of "debt collectors" working for loanshark [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]]. Lotas disliked the "frailties of the flesh", preferring to be considered more a machine than a being, so he felt admiration towards assassin droid [[HN-TR1]], another member of the Protocol Team.<ref name="AIR" />

During the [[Glite-Ven hostilities]], Lotas noticed the sadistic droid [[EV-4D9]] and expressed his interest on it, an interest shared by HN-TR1. Following their advice, Ploovo bought EV-4D9, who became a new member of the Protocol Team. Lotas respected EV-4D9's darkly analytical functions.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' {{1stm}}
